summary: LLM Integration Testing Complete: All 14 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend UI verified with all required elements present. Real Gemini LLM integration working - backend logs show successful LiteLLM calls to gemini-2.5-flash model. Submit prompts endpoint creates update records correctly.
passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/health returns {status: ok}
Backend: POST /api/auth/login with admin credentials returns token
Backend: GET /api/training/feedbacks returns list of feedbacks
Backend: POST /api/training/analyze/{feedback_id} calls REAL Gemini LLM and returns qwen_suggestion + opencv_suggestion
Backend: POST /api/training/analyze with non-existent ID returns 404
Backend: POST /api/training/submit-prompts/{feedback_id} creates update records
Backend: POST /api/training/submit-prompts requires at least one prompt (400 on empty)
Backend: POST /api/training/submit-prompts with non-existent ID returns 404
Backend: GET /api/training/updates returns submitted prompts as pending updates
Backend: Submit only Qwen prompt (no OpenCV) creates 1 update
Backend: Submit only OpenCV rule (no Qwen) creates 1 update
Backend: GET /api/training/sync works (regression)
Backend: GET /api/training/feedbacks returns data (regression)
Backend: GET /api/training/stats returns stats (regression)
Backend: GET /api/training/monitors returns data (regression)
Frontend: Login flow works (heart click → EKG animation → form → hub)
Frontend: Navigation to /hybridtraining works
Frontend: Step indicator buttons (1-5) present with data-testid
Frontend: Feedback queue shows 7 pending items
Frontend: Selecting feedback navigates to Step 2
Frontend: QWEN textarea visible (data-testid: qwen-prompt-input)
Frontend: OPENCV textarea visible (data-testid: opencv-rule-input)
Frontend: SUBMIT TO QWEN FOR ANALYSIS button visible (data-testid: analyze-submit-btn)
Frontend: SUBMIT PROMPTS button visible (data-testid: submit-prompts-btn)
Frontend: Step 3 Updates panel shows QWEN and OPENCV sections
seed_data_creation: Feedbacks synced from Readisys API (10 total items)
context_for_next_testing_agent: LLM integration verified working. POST /api/training/analyze/{feedback_id} calls REAL Gemini (gemini-2.5-flash) via emergentintegrations library. LLM call takes 10-25 seconds. POST /api/training/submit-prompts/{feedback_id} creates update records in training_updates collection. Frontend Step 2 has QWEN and OPENCV textareas that populate with AI suggestions after clicking analyze. SUBMIT PROMPTS button sends final prompts to backend and navigates to Step 3.
mocked_api_note: POST /api/training/apply/{update_id} (mocked - applies update record but doesn't call real Qwen/OpenCV). POST /api/training/monitors/{monitor_id}/check (mocked status check). Steps 4-5 are still mocked.

llm_integration_verification.backend_logs_confirm: LiteLLM completion() model= gemini/gemini-2.5-flash; LLM analysis complete for feedback fb-*
